properties.text: Set the clip’s position \nin the final movie

widgets_values: An endless sea of slow-moving molten lava glowing deep orange and red. Jagged black volcanic peaks break the horizon, silhouetted against a sky of thick amber smoke.Chunks of dark rock on the lava's surface. The lava is the only light source, underlighting everything in harsh warm tones. Extreme wide shot, hellish primordial atmosphere. Cinematic. Shot on 24mm f/8, deep focus.

nodes.title: Model download links
widgets_values:
Both LoRAs work well CelebV-HQ is the better default, TalkVid is best for clean studio-style talking heads.

[VISUAL]: A giant crowd of people is laughing hysterically.  

[SPEECH]: 

[SOUNDS]: A hall filled with laughter. A giant crowd is laughing.

properties.text: Set the clip’s position \nin the final movie

widgets_values: A futuristic military gun with an angular design. A handcrafted jury-rigged futuristic lazer blaster laid horizontally on a seamless pale grey studio backdrop, shot in profile from the side. The giant weapon has a hand-milled steel barrel wrapped tightly in polished copper coils, clear coolant tubing threaded through the wooden stock and glowing a soft electric blue, a scavenged car battery integrated into the rear housing, and a scratched brass charging handle. Crafted from thick metal plates, rusta and clean with glowing wires.  Even, soft studio lighting from a large overhead softbox, no harsh shadows, subtle falloff toward the edges of the frame. Shot on an 85mm lens, razor sharp across the full length of the weapon, shallow depth of field falling off behind it. Neutral grey backdrop, product photography clarity. Use the drawing as rough layout.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic scene of a person working on a handcrafted weapon. The garage walls are covered in paper and the lights are flickering.

properties.text: Set the clip’s position \nin the final movie

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic scene of a person talkin on the news, close up of a flickering old tv. The news anchor says "What you're seeing on your screen is live, unedited footage from downtown, and I've just been told this is happening simultaneously over at least forty cities worldwide. Authorities are urging everyone to remain indoors, stay away from windows, and whatever you do… do not look directly up." Right after she finishes talking the TV turns off.

Remove everything except for the creature on the chalkboard. Turn the drawing on the green chalkboard into a realistic depiction of the creature in front of a dark neutral grey background. Focus only on the alien creature. The creature ios filling out the entire image. A professional 3d rendering of an alien creature. The floating alien creature is as big as a zeppelin.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic title animation: "BUG SKY" sits centered in large chitinous insect-shell typography. The letters pulse subtly as if breathing, thick slime slowly dripping from their undersides in glistening strands, small antennae twitching at the edges of the serifs. Translucent wing membranes between the strokes flutter faintly, catching amber highlights. Surrounded by soft fog clouds.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic handheld shot slowly pushes in behind a person as they stand frozen in the middle of the suburban street. Ahead, two massive insectoid alien creatures drift slowly over the burning city skyline, their segmented bodies swaying, antennae twitching as thick black smoke pours from the skyscrapers below. Low atmospheric rumble, crackling distant flames, faint sirens echoing through the neighborhood.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic handheld shot follows the running person's gaze as they spin around wide-eyed, the camera tilting upward. As the gaze drifts, the camera follows. Deep atmospheric rumble, crackling flames, distant screams.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: Wide shot: The person from the reference image stands alone at a wooden lecture podium in a modern university lecture hall. Their expression is desperate and impassioned, mouth open mid-word as if pleading to be believed. Behind them, a massive green chalkboard sprawls with dense orbital equations, scribbled star maps, and a hand-drawn sketch of a curved, insect-shelled alien vessel. In the slightly out-of-focus foreground, the backs of dozens of students can be seen. Moody cinematic lighting. Match the facial features and style exactly. A still from a hollywood blockbuster.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values:
Create a low angle view of the person in this location. Create a close up by zooming in on the person. The alien creature drawing fills the background. A cinematic composition. The person is looking to the right. The person looks worried.

Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values:
An extreme low angle view rows of students loughing hysterically, some of them are pointing toward the camera. A large crowd fills the lecture hall. The crowd is diverese filled with men, women of all ages and ethnicities.  

Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: The person from the reference image sits hunched at a garage workbench at night, assembling a handcrafted futuristic machine gun, their scarred hands locking a small machined core into its receiver. The weapon's copper coils glow faint electric blue, underlighting their face from below, while a single bare bulb on a frayed cord throws a warm amber pool across the bench. At the corner sits a framed photograph turned deliberately face-down. Behind them, the entire garage wall is a conspiracy theorist's obsession — newspaper clippings, blurry photographs, hand-drawn orbital diagrams, and printed star charts crisscrossed with taut red string pinned between them, dense and layered from floor to ceiling. Shot on a 35mm lens, low angle across the bench, the rifle soft in the foreground and their face sharp in the middle distance. Cinematic 2.39:1 anamorphic framing. Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain. Mood: monastic, obsessive — the quiet devotion of someone preparing for a single moment. Multiple cans of bug spray stand on the around the person. One large bottle of bug killer is glued to the gun.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A close up of a centered flickering tv. glow of an old CRT television on a nearby crate.  On the TV, a visibly shaken newscaster speaks from a cluttered news desk, behind her a chyron reads "BREAKING: UNIDENTIFIED CRAFT SIGHTED WORLDWIDE" above scrolling tickers, and an inset video loop shows grainy phone footage of a dark curved shape hanging above a distant city skyline. The TV throws shifting blue-white light across the subject's face and across the conspiracy wall behind them — red strings, photos, and diagrams briefly illuminated with each cut of the broadcast, then swallowed back into shadow. Shot on a 50mm lens, medium close-up from a low angle beside the TV, the screen visible in soft focus at the edge of frame, the subject's face sharp in the middle of the frame. Cinematic 2.39:1 anamorphic framing. Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain. Behind the newscaster an image of an insect alien creature can be seen.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: The person from the reference image stands in a suburban driveway at dawn, the open garage door behind him, face tilted up toward the sky, eyes wide in stunned disbelief. Across the upper half of the frame, the vast curved underside of a floating insect alien creature, casting the entire street in deep shadow. Pale evening light light still clings to the horizon behind them, warm against the cold blue darkness night sky cast from high above — two colliding color temperatures on their skin. The floating alien is so massive that a soft blue distance fog covers the belly. Shot on a 35mm lens, tight medium framing on the face, low angle looking slightly up. Cinematic 2.39:1 anamorphic framing. Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain. Mood: awestruck, terrifying. The entire scene is filled with supernatural fog

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: Wide establishing shot from a suburban hilltop at dusk. In the foreground, the person from the reference image stands with their back to camera. A quiet cul-de-sac of single-family houses flanks them. The road slopes away down the hill toward a modern city skyline in the middle distance. Rising through and around the distant city are kaiju-scale versions of the floating alien creatures hovering above the burning skyscrapers dwarfing the buildings. Columns of smoke rise between them. The last band of orange dusk clings to the horizon behind the creatures, against the cool dusk-blue falling over the suburbs. cinematic 2.39:1 anamorphic framing. Style: grounded contemporary thriller realism, muted desaturated palette, subtle film grain. Mood: awestruck, terrifying. The entire scene is filled with supernatural fog

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A title card on a pure black background. The words "BUG SKY" rendered in large, centered, all-caps typography — the letterforms sculpted from glistening chitinous insect shell, segmented like beetle carapaces with visible joints, fine hairs, and twitching antennae sprouting from the serifs. Wet slime drips slowly from the bottom of each letter, catching faint green-amber highlights. Subtle translucent wing membranes stretched between some of the strokes, veined and iridescent. Dramatic rim lighting from above, deep shadows pooling beneath the letters, shallow depth of field, cinematic horror movie poster aesthetic, ultra-detailed macro texture. Use the surface of the alien concept for the letters.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic handheld shot on a person standing in the middle of the suburban street, holding the handcrafted blaster on chest height. They look up determined and serious into the late evening sky, jaw tightening, The glowing cyan energy cell hums brighter as copper coils begin to pulse. Frontal view. Fully visible face. A light determined smile on their face.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Extreme close up of the persons face, the person is looking determined with a hint of a smirk. Centered in the frame, the person is looking into the distance. In the blurred background the destroyed ruins and desert can be seen. Golden side light. Next to his face he is holding one futuristic blaster weapon made from old metal.
